intent_tree: {"查找并确认音频文件，同时检查其质量是否清晰": {"查找音频文件": {}, "检查音频文件质量": {"使用工具检测音频质量": {}, "快速试听检查异常": {}}}}
task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "打开文件资源管理器并进入桌面目录"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "在搜索栏输入音频扩展名（如*.mp3 *.wav *.m4a）"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "按修改日期筛选昨天的文件"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "根据文件命名模式查找目标音频文件"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "右键文件属性查看创建时间以确认"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "安装Audacity音频分析工具"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "导入音频文件至Audacity"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "观察波形图判断录音质量"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "进行频谱分析检测频率分布"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "使用VLC播放器试听音频"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "启用VLC波形可视化观察异常"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "识别并标记音频中的杂音问题"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "search"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "filterByDate"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "patternMatching"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "verifyFile"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node7", "type": "installTool"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node8", "type": "analyzeWaveform"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node9", "type": "performSpectrumAnalysis"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node11", "type": "enableVisualization"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node12", "type": "identifyNoise"}]}
